tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: From crash survivor to World Cup champion: Tazmin Brits's triumphant return
stories.summary: Tazmin Brits, told she might never walk properly after a car crash 14 years ago, scored 114 runs to lead South Africa to Women's T20 World Cup glory in Bristol.

stories.headline: A community's gift: Loyal customers secretly buy their delivery driver a new car
stories.summary: Eighty-five people in Shorne secretly raised £3,620 so Ann West, 59, could keep her delivery job after her car broke down after two decades with the company.

stories.headline: Sea turtles including 'Pretty Pretty Princess' swim free after months of healing
stories.summary: Twelve cold-stunned sea turtles, including one aquarium staff named Pretty Pretty Princess, swam home from the New England Aquarium after months of healing.

stories.headline: New wireless brain implant gives woman with speech struggles a voice again
stories.summary: A University of Michigan patient received a wireless brain implant with 421 microelectrodes, giving her a synthesized voice after motor neuron disease silenced her.

stories.headline: Penguin colony surges: African endangered species shows real signs of recovery
stories.summary: Breeding pairs at South Africa's Boulders Beach jumped from 698 to 790, offering genuine hope for the critically endangered African penguin.

stories.headline: Houston's Venezuelan community packs 1,000 hope-filled boxes for earthquake survivors
stories.summary: Venezuelan-Americans like Arianna Regardia packed 1,000 boxes of aid at a Katy warehouse, writing messages of hope on warehouse walls for earthquake survivors back home.

stories.headline: Seven endangered Golden Langurs rescued from traffickers find freedom in the forest
stories.summary: Primates saved from international wildlife traders are released into Assam's protected park, sending a powerful message against poaching.

stories.headline: Neymar's tearful return: Eight months of grinding work pays off
stories.summary: Neymar, sidelined since May 17, returned to play for Brazil in the 76th minute against Scotland at the 2026 World Cup—moved to tears by eight months of grinding rehabilitation.

stories.headline: Local business quietly repairs struggling father's damaged window—for free
stories.summary: KT Fairglass replaced a struggling family's $3,000 damaged window at no cost through its monthly Community Give Back program.

stories.headline: AI discovers new cancer-fighting therapy in weeks instead of years
stories.summary: Penn Medicine researchers used AI to identify GPNMB as a cancer-fighting CAR T cell therapy target in weeks—a discovery that traditionally takes years.
